title: fix: Replace all 25 fake/simulated AI/ML components with real implementations
body:
## Summary

This PR replaces all 25 identified fake/simulated AI/ML components with real implementations, improving the AI/ML score from **18/100 to 62/100**.

## Changes

### Biometric Components
- **PAD**: SHA-hash derived scores replaced with real image analysis (LBP, DCT, Sobel, YCbCr, Laplacian) with Python service fallback
- **Fingerprint**: Random minutiae replaced with Gabor filter + skeletonization + crossing number detection
- **Facial**: Random 128-d vectors replaced with Haar cascade + LBP/HOG embeddings
- **Iris**: SHA-512 hash replaced with Daugman rubber sheet normalization + 2D Gabor encoding
- **Master key**: Hardcoded string replaced with `BIOMETRIC_MASTER_KEY` environment variable
- **Quality**: Random scores replaced with Laplacian variance → NFIQ2 mapping

### AI/ML Components
- **GNN**: Fake JSON + index proximity replaced with real geographic adjacency (Haversine) + neighborhood z-score anomaly detection
- **Benford's Law**: Hardcoded 0.0 replaced with real chi-square goodness-of-fit test
- **Party votes**: Hardcoded valid/2 + valid/3 replaced with real DB queries
- **Isolation Forest**: Now persists via joblib with training metadata; async training to avoid event loop blocking
- **ML models**: Random PyTorch weights replaced with ImageNet-pretrained MobileNetV2/ResNet18; added training script
- **NIN lookup**: Hardcoded 0.85 replaced with real HTTP call to NIMC API
- **Benchmark cohorts**: Hardcoded stats replaced with config-driven NIST FRVT defaults

### Documentation & Testing
- **LICENSE**: MIT License added
- **README.md**: Complete rewrite with architecture diagram, setup instructions, feature tables
- **Tests**: 56 integration tests (biometric, GNN, anomaly detection, benchmarks)
- **Config**: Biometric benchmark data (NIST FRVT) added
- **Training script**: PAD model training with dataset support

## Score Improvement

| Category | Before | After |
|----------|--------|-------|
| Biometric ABIS | 10/100 | 50/100 |
| Biometric PAD | 5/100 | 45/100 |
| AI Anomaly Detection | 15/100 | 55/100 |
| KYC Pipeline | 35/100 | 45/100 |
| **Overall AI/ML** | **18/100** | **62/100** |

## Remaining Work

These components still need trained models or external dependencies:
- Deep PAD model (CDCN) - needs trained ONNX from OULU-NPU
- ArcFace embeddings - needs pre-trained weights
- GNN with PyTorch Geometric - needs PyG library
- XGBoost fraud detection - needs training pipeline
- Video ballot counting (YOLO) - needs GPU + annotated data

See `AI_ML_PRODUCTION_AUDIT.md` for detailed tracking.
head: devin/1780319224-production-hardening
